caption: The video features a man performing on stage, likely at a concert or event. He is wearing a white shirt with a black vest adorned with blue floral embroidery and a red pendant featuring a black design. The man has glasses and his hair is tied back. He is holding an acoustic guitar and singing into a microphone, suggesting he is a musician or singer. The audience is visible in the foreground, with several people watching attentively. The background consists of wooden blinds, indicating an indoor setting. The logo "ORCA" is displayed in the bottom right corner, possibly indicating the name of the venue or organization hosting the event. The atmosphere appears to be intimate and focused on the performance.
